'''âf-n-sh''' ('''kafanash''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:queerify|queerify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-n-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:queerify|queerify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-n-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kafanash
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifanash|thifanash]] || [[word:jifanash|jifanash]] || [[word:shifanash|shifanash]] || [[word:kifanash|kifanash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufanash|thuthufanash]] || [[word:jujufanash|jujufanash]] || [[word:shushufanash|shushufanash]] || [[word:kukufanash|kukufanash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufanash|thufanash]] || [[word:jufanash|jufanash]] || [[word:shufanash|shufanash]] || [[word:kufanash|kufanash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufanash|thufanash]] || [[word:jufanash|jufanash]] || [[word:shufanash|shufanash]] || [[word:kufanash|kufanash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefanash|thefanash]] || [[word:jefanash|jefanash]] || [[word:shefanash|shefanash]] || [[word:kefanash|kefanash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofanash|thothofanash]] || [[word:jojofanash|jojofanash]] || [[word:shoshofanash|shoshofanash]] || [[word:kokofanash|kokofanash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofanash|thofanash]] || [[word:jofanash|jofanash]] || [[word:shofanash|shofanash]] || [[word:kofanash|kofanash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofanash|thofanash]] || [[word:jofanash|jofanash]] || [[word:shofanash|shofanash]] || [[word:kofanash|kofanash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠfanash|thĂŠfanash]] || [[word:jĂŠfanash|jĂŠfanash]] || [[word:shĂŠfanash|shĂŠfanash]] || [[word:kĂŠfanash|kĂŠfanash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafanash|thathafanash]] || [[word:jajafanash|jajafanash]] || [[word:shashafanash|shashafanash]] || [[word:kakafanash|kakafanash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafanash|thafanash]] || [[word:jafanash|jafanash]] || [[word:shafanash|shafanash]] || [[word:kafanash|kafanash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafanash|thafanash]] || [[word:jafanash|jafanash]] || [[word:shafanash|shafanash]] || [[word:kafanash|kafanash]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shafanash|shafanash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshafanash|goshafanash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishafanash|gokishafanash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shafanashnĂŒ|shafanashnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshafanashnknĂŒ|goshafanashnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishafanashnĂŒ|gokishafanashnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafanashĂ«|shafanashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafanashnkshĂ«|goshafanashnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafanashĂ«|gokishafanashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafanashro|shafanashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafanashnkro|goshafanashnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafanashro|gokishafanashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shafanashmu|shafanashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafanashnkmu|goshafanashnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafanashmu|gokishafanashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shafanasher|shafanasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshafanashnksher|goshafanashnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishafanasher|gokishafanasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shafanashng|shafanashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshafanashnkng|goshafanashnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishafanashng|gokishafanashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shafanashya|shafanashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshafanashnkya|goshafanashnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishafanashya|gokishafanashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shafanashyam|shafanashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshafanashnkyam|goshafanashnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishafanashyam|gokishafanashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafanashnĂŒshĂ«|shafanashnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafanashnknĂŒshĂ«|goshafanashnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafanashnĂŒshĂ«|gokishafanashnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafanashnĂŒro|shafanashnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafanashnknĂŒro|goshafanashnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafanashnĂŒro|gokishafanashnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafanashnĂŒmu|shafanashnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafanashnknĂŒmu|goshafanashnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafanashnĂŒmu|gokishafanashnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafanashĂ«nĂŒ|shafanashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafanashnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshafanashnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafanashĂ«nĂŒ|gokishafanashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafanashĂ«ro|shafanashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafanashnkshĂ«ro|goshafanashnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafanashĂ«ro|gokishafanashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafanashĂ«mu|shafanashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafanashnkshĂ«mu|goshafanashnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafanashĂ«mu|gokishafanashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafanashronĂŒ|shafanashronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafanashnkronĂŒ|goshafanashnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafanashronĂŒ|gokishafanashronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafanashroshĂ«|shafanashroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafanashnkroshĂ«|goshafanashnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafanashroshĂ«|gokishafanashroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafanashromu|shafanashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafanashnkromu|goshafanashnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafanashromu|gokishafanashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafanashmunĂŒ|shafanashmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafanashnkmunĂŒ|goshafanashnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafanashmunĂŒ|gokishafanashmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafanashmushĂ«|shafanashmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafanashnkmushĂ«|goshafanashnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafanashmushĂ«|gokishafanashmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafanashmuro|shafanashmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafanashnkmuro|goshafanashnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafanashmuro|gokishafanashmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
